name: visitor-npc-gender-fields
title: 游客与 NPC 性别字段
description: Add controlled gender fields for TavernCharacter and tavern-scoped VisitorState across backend, frontend, persistence, tests, and docs.
creator: lijin
notes: Implemented Gender enum: unspecified/female/male/nonbinary/other. NPC gender uses gender; visitor input uses visitor_gender and persists as VisitorState.gender scoped to tavern+visitor. No global profile, discovery filter, or AI inference added.

done: Backend dataclasses/API contracts normalize and round-trip NPC and visitor gender.
JSON and MySQL persistence round-trip TavernCharacter.gender and VisitorState.gender.
Frontend helper, tavern client types, chat UI, and NPC editor expose controlled gender options.
WORLD_SCHEMA and Trellis backend/frontend specs updated.
verification: RED: py -3 -m pytest -q backend/tests/test_v1_gender_fields.py --tb=short -> failed on missing gender fields
RED: node .\frontend\scripts\gender-fields-test.mjs -> failed ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND for gender.js

RED: py -3 -m pytest -q backend/tests/test_mysql_infrastructure.py::TestCharacterCRUD::test_character_gender_round_trip backend/tests/test_mysql_infrastructure.py::TestVisitorState::test_update_and_get_visitor_state --tb=short -> failed dataclass unexpected gender
py -3 -m pytest -q --tb=short with proxy env cleared -> 384 passed, 6 warnings
git diff --check -> no whitespace errors (line-ending warnings only)
